/doc/units/rpactivexreport.html.desc: TRpActiveXReport, the palette-installable TCustomControl base class behind Report Manager's TReportMan ActiveX control for hosting reports.

/doc/units/rpalias.html.desc: TRpAlias component and TRpAliasList/TRpAliasItem classes that pass application-opened TDataset objects to a report or expression evaluator by alias.

/doc/units/rpaxreportimp.html.desc: TReportManX, the legacy ActiveX control implementation (TActiveXControl, IReportManX) built on TRpActiveXReport for embedding Report Manager.

/doc/units/rpclxreport.html.desc: TCLXReport, a cross-platform Windows/Linux report component using the GDI and PDF print drivers, selectable via its driver property.

/doc/units/rpcompobase.html.desc: TCBaseReport, the driver-independent base class shared by the palette report components TVCLReport, TPDFReport and the legacy TCLXReport.

/doc/units/rpdatainfo.html.desc: Central database and dataset access registry: TRpDatabaseInfoItem/List and TRpDataInfoItem/List, the single place to add or toggle DB drivers.

/doc/units/rpdataset.html.desc: TRpDataset, a two-record-buffer dataset over TClientDataset that looks ahead one row so the engine can group on expression changes and print footers.

/doc/units/rpdrawitem.html.desc: TRpShape and TRpImage print items: drawing shapes and lines, and rendering embedded, external-file, or database-field images in reports.

/doc/units/rpeval.html.desc: TRpEvaluator and TRpCustomEvaluator, the expression evaluator that parses and computes report expressions and returns a Variant TRpValue.

/doc/units/rpevalfunc.html.desc: Built-in expression evaluator functions for Report Manager: text, date, math and formatting (Upper, Trim, Round, Today, FormatStr, NumToText, etc.).

/doc/units/rpexpredlg.html.desc: TRpExpreDialog and the ChangeExpression helper: the legacy CLX expression-builder wizard dialog for composing report formulas.

/doc/units/rpexpredlgvcl.html.desc: TRpExpreDialogVCL and the ChangeExpression helper: the VCL expression-builder wizard dialog for composing Report Manager formulas.

/doc/units/rpgdidriver.html.desc: TRpGDIDriver, the Windows-only GDI render driver that prints reports or metafiles to printers and bitmaps, with PDF export and print-dialog helpers.

/doc/units/rpgdifonts.html.desc: Windows device-font selection for fast dot-matrix printing: TPrinterFont, TFontStep CPI sizes and routines to match and rotate printer fonts.

/doc/units/rpgraphutils.html.desc: Legacy CLX graphic helpers: locale-translated message and input boxes, grid drawing, twips/pixel and font-style conversions, and treeview filling.

/doc/units/rpgraphutilsvcl.html.desc: VCL graphic helpers: locale-translated RpMessageBox/RpInputBox dialogs, grid drawing, twips/pixel and font-style conversions, treeview filling.

/doc/units/rplabelitem.html.title: rplabelitem.pas
/doc/units/rplabelitem.html.desc: TRpLabel and TRpExpression text print items for rendering multilingual labels and evaluated expressions or database fields in a report.

/doc/units/rplastsav.html.desc: rplastsav.pas defines TRpLastUsedStrings, a component that saves, loads and displays recently opened files as short names in Report Manager.

/doc/units/rpmdbarcode.html.desc: rpmdbarcode.pas defines TRpBarcode, the barcode print component, and TRpBarcodeType covering Code 39, Code 128, EAN-8, EAN-13, MSI and more.

/doc/units/rpmdchart.html.desc: rpmdchart.pas defines TRpChart with its series collections, chart types (line, bar, pie, gantt) and TeeChart or engine chart drivers.

/doc/units/rpmdconsts.html.desc: rpmdconsts.pas provides resource string translation, including TranslateStr to resolve a string by id in the current user language.

/doc/units/rpmdshfolder.html.desc: rpmdshfolder.pas resolves per-user, per-machine and system config file paths across Windows and Linux for Report Manager settings.

/doc/units/rpmetafile.html.desc: rpmetafile.pas defines the IRpPrintDriver abstraction and the streamable TRpMetafileReport page format used to store and draw reports.

/doc/units/rpmreg.html.desc: rpmreg.pas provides the Register procedure that registers the non-visual Report Manager components in the Delphi/Kylix package.

/doc/units/rpmunits.html.desc: rpmunits.pas converts measurements between twips, centimeters and inches, with helpers to format and parse the current report unit.

/doc/units/rppagesetup.html.desc: rppagesetup.pas provides the legacy CLX page setup and print options dialog, TFRpPageSetup, and the ExecutePageSetup function.

/doc/units/rppagesetupvcl.html.desc: rppagesetupvcl.pas provides the VCL page setup and print options dialog, TFRpPageSetupVCL, and the ExecutePageSetup function.

/doc/units/rpparams.html.desc: rpparams.pas defines report parameters (TRpParam, TRpParamList) that feed datasets and expressions, plus param type conversion helpers.

/doc/units/rpparser.html.desc: rpparser.pas defines TRpParser, the expression tokenizer that splits expressions into strings, numbers, operators and identifiers.

/doc/units/rppdfdriver.html.desc: rppdfdriver.pas defines TRpPdfDriver and SaveMetafileToPDF / PrintReportPDF functions to render report metafiles to Adobe PDF files or streams.

/doc/units/rppdffile.html.desc: rppdffile.pas provides TRpPDFFile and TRpPDFCanvas, a canvas-like PDF writer with font handling and non-visual bitmap/JPEG info helpers.

/doc/units/rppdfreport.html.desc: rppdfreport.pas defines TPDFReport, a drop-in component that renders reports to PDF on Windows and Linux without an X server.

/doc/units/rppreview.html.desc: rppreview.pas provides the legacy CLX preview form TFRpPreview and the ShowPreview function, built on the TRpQtDriver component.

/doc/units/rpprintitem.html.desc: Base classes for printable report components: TRpCommonComponent, positioned and text items, plus collections and section-alignment types.

/doc/units/rpqtdriver.html.desc: Legacy Qt/CLX print driver (TRpQtDriver) for Windows and Linux, with routines to print, preview, set page size and export reports to PDF.

/doc/units/rpreport.html.desc: The TRpReport document class: holds database and dataset info plus subreports and runs the print process through a metafile driver.

/doc/units/rprfparams.html.desc: Legacy CLX runtime parameters dialog (TFRpRunTimeParams) that builds input controls per parameter type and prompts the user before printing.

/doc/units/rprfvparams.html.desc: VCL runtime user-parameters dialog (TFRpRTParams) that builds input controls per parameter type and prompts the user before printing a report.

/doc/units/rpruler.html.desc: Legacy CLX TRpRuler control that draws a horizontal or vertical ruler in centimeters or inches, with a PaintRuler bitmap function.

/doc/units/rprulervcl.html.desc: VCL TRpRulerVCL control that draws a horizontal or vertical designer ruler in centimeters or inches, with a PaintRuler bitmap function.

/doc/units/rpsection.html.desc: TRpSection, the band container for printable components: page/group headers, detail and footer section types within a subreport.

/doc/units/rpsecutil.html.desc: Section collection classes TRpSectionListItem and TRpSectionList used to hold the ordered bands of a subreport.

/doc/units/rpsubreport.html.desc: TRpSubReport, the container for TRpSection bands, with methods like AddGroup and AddDetail; a report can hold any number of subreports.

/doc/units/rptranslator.html.desc: TRpTranslator localization component: loads reportmanres locale resource files by user locale to translate engine widestrings at runtime.

/doc/units/rptypes.html.desc: Core engine base types and utilities: parameter, font, brush, shape, page and printer enums, twips unit, plus formatting and printer helpers.

/doc/units/rptypeval.html.desc: Base expression-evaluator types and classes: tokens, TRpValue variant, identifiers, functions and arithmetic, comparison and logical operators.

/doc/units/rpvclreport.html.desc: TVCLReport, the Windows-only palette component you drop on forms to print and export reports via the GDI and PDF drivers.

/doc/units/rpvgraphutils.html.desc: Legacy CLX-to-GDI helpers: page size and color conversion, bitmap and mosaic drawing, JPEG decoding and raw printer control codes on Windows.

/doc/units/rpvpreview.html.desc: VCL report preview form TFRpVPreview and the ShowPreview function, rendering on screen through the TRpGDIDriver component.

/doc/units/rpwriter.html.desc: Functions to convert reports between the native binary stream format and editable plain text: FileReportToPlainText and PlainTextToFileReport.

/doc/usingcompo.html.desc: Embed reports in Delphi/C++Builder/Kylix apps with TVCLReport, TRpPDFReport, TRpEvaluator and TRpAlias: key properties, methods and print steps.
